# My Skill

This is the overview section. It describes what the skill does.

## Setup

Prerequisites for using this skill:
- Node.js 18+
- An API key

## Usage

### Basic Usage

Run the skill with default options.

```bash
skill run --input file.txt
```

Check your file permissions.

### Common error: timeout

Increase the timeout setting.
